station_name: HP PETROL PUMP - MUMBAI TAXI ASSC.
station_address: 3VHH+5PR, Chunabhatti BEST Bus Depot Rd, near C S T, Vrindavan, Kurla West, Sion, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400070
text:
I have visited HP Petrol Pump- Mumbai Taxi Assn. Kurla named pump for refuelling 2 litres of petrol in my bike.
At night around 12:12 AM ; 23/01/2022 the person preset to refuel petrol has done unfair trade practice.
He fuelled my bike by jerking the petrol gun and not by automatic lock system & when i asked about the same he started misbehaving , shouting and yelling at me over my concern and was defaming me by saying certain words.
Next i have warned him that i will complain to your manager then he laughed and flew my sentences away!
After then i checked that the fuel guage did not came up in my meter and it was at the same level before refuelling.
I request you to please look into the matter and take immediate action againt the pump for performing unlawful task and to investigate the person over there that why he jerked and fuelled my bike?

Horrible experience
